items.name: Pipe Pressure Drop
items.summary: Composes Reynolds + friction model + Darcy-Weisbach for pipe pressure loss.

items.name: Isentropic Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve any supported isentropic input to any supported output through Mach pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: Mach, MachAngle, Prandtl-Meyer angle, p/p0, T/T0, rho/rho0, A/A*

items.name: Normal Shock Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve normal-shock input kinds to target kinds through deterministic M1 pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: M1, M2, p2/p1, rho2/rho1, T2/T1, p02/p01
Target kinds: M1, M2, p2/p1, rho2/rho1, T2/T1, p02/p01
